lodgr
Log in

Your empty nights are worth something.

List your home or timeshare, release the nights you won't use, and earn points every time a member books. Redeem them for stays across the network.

Points are credited at booking and unlock on a simple schedule — see how it works.

List your home
How it works
01
Add your home
Sync a short-term rental in minutes, or add a timeshare with a quick ownership check.
02
Release the nights you won't use
Set it and forget it, or choose dates yourself. Your calendar stays yours — nights remain bookable for cash until someone books them, either way.
03
Stay anywhere in the network
Every booking earns points. Spend them on homes and resorts across the network.
The fair-trade rule
You keep whatever your guest gives up. If a guest cancels early, their points return and yours release. If they cancel late, you keep your share. When they check in, every point is yours.
Lodgr is a Paramount Realty Solutions company. Point values shown are illustrative.
‹
Step 1 of 3

What are you bringing to the exchange?

Lodgr is a closed exchange — every member lists a place. You can add more properties of either type later.

A short-term rental
→
Listed on Airbnb or Vrbo — we'll sync it automatically through Hostaway.
A timeshare or vacation ownership
→
We'll set it up manually and verify your ownership — usually reviewed within 1–2 business days.
Either way, you start with 1,000 free points.
‹
Step 2 of 3 · Short-term rental
L
⇄
H

Connect Hostaway to sync your listing

Hostaway keeps your Airbnb and Vrbo calendars in one place. Connecting lets Lodgr fill empty nights without ever double-booking you.

What we'll read
✓Your listing content — photos, description, amenities
✓Your calendar and availability
✓Your nightly rates (used to place your tier)
The only thing we'll write
✎A calendar block when a points stay books — so the night closes on Airbnb and Vrbo instantly. Nothing else, ever.
Connect with Hostaway
I don't have a Hostaway account — we'll help you create one, it's free for this.
You can disconnect anytime from Hosting settings. (Demo: continues to Explore.)

Fernwood A-Frame

◆ Gold
Big Sur, CA · Entire cabin · Sleeps 4 · 2 bd · 1 ba · ★ 4.92 (58)
Gold tier reflects location, size, ratings, and typical nightly rate. Tiers are reviewed by our team.

Redwood-shaded A-frame two minutes from Pfeiffer Beach. Wood stove, outdoor cedar tub, and a loft bedroom with a full-wall window into the canopy. Fast Wi-Fi, no cell service — on purpose.

Hot tub
Wood stove
Wi-Fi
Kitchen
Parking
Pet friendly

Points cover the stay; cleaning and taxes are charged to your card. No fees are added at checkout that aren't shown here.
Cancellation policy
Full refunduntil Feb 26
50% backFeb 26 – Mar 5
No refundafter Mar 5
Cash fees refund on the same schedule. Whatever you give up, the owner keeps — that's the fair-trade rule.
Refund tiers shown are placeholder values pending final policy.
Hosted by Maren K. · Member since 2026 · Also lists on Airbnb. All messaging, check-in details, and support run through Lodgr.
